title: moenchia mantica subsp. caerulea
intro: Moenchia mantica subsp. caerulea, also known as the blue spike moss or blue moenchia, is a plant species belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. Traditionally, Moenchia mantica subsp. caerulea has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, Moenchia mantica subsp. caerulea is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
